title: Asyneuma sintenisii
taxonomy: Asyneuma sintenisii is a species of flowering plant in the bellflower family, Campanulaceae. It is classified as a member of the genus Asyneuma, which includes a group of plants commonly found in mountainous regions. The plant is native to the Caucasus region and is closely related to other Asyneuma species. Asyneuma sintenisii is further classified as a part of the family Campanulaceae, order Asterales, and class Magnoliopsida. This classification reflects its botanical characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Campanulaceae family.
